ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College or university the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Draft round */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Rookie year of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the football team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference (e.g., NFC, AFC) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_advanced_stats" (
  "adv_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advanced statistic entry */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "tm_paATTs" INTEGER /* Team passing attempts */,
  "tm_airYDs" INTEGER /* Team air yards */,
  "tgtshare" REAL /* Target share */,
  "aydshare" REAL /* Air yards share */,
  "wopr" REAL /* Weighted opportunity rate */,
  "racr" REAL /* Receiving air conversion rate */,
  "adot" REAL /* Average depth of target */,
  "dom" REAL /* Dominance (percentage of team's offensive plays) */,
  "epa_per_play" REAL /* Expected points added per play */,
  "wpa_per_play" REAL /* Win probability added per play */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of plays */,
  "burst_rate" REAL /* Burst rate (percentage of explosive plays) */,
  "breakout_rate" REAL /* Breakout rate (percentage of plays exceeding 10 yards) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adv_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_advanced_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the season */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "score_team" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "score_opponent" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, scout, fan) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Team the user is affiliated with (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Estimated recovery date */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  "rehab_program" TEXT /* Rehabilitation program details */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, inactive, on IR) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Actual return date (if different from the estimated recovery date) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Base salary for the contract period */,
  "bonuses" REAL /* Bonuses included in the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., guaranteed, non-guaranteed) */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Guaranteed amount in the contract */,
  "performance_bonuses" REAL /* Performance-based bonuses */,
  "signing_bonus" REAL /* Signing bonus */,
  "incentives" TEXT /* Additional incentives (e.g., playoff appearance, MVP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
